ice_cream.label: Ice Cream
ice_cream.tagline: Demand climbs fast as heat departs above normal — peak impulse category.
ice_cream.creative_angle: Lean into the heat: "Beat the {temp_f}° spike." Push chilled, on-the-go impulse occasions; day-part toward the afternoon peak.

sunscreen.label: Sunscreen
sunscreen.tagline: Sun-protection demand spikes with hotter, brighter-than-normal days.
sunscreen.creative_angle: Sell preparedness: "{temp_f}° and climbing — cover up." Lead with UV/outdoor occasions and same-day pickup.

lemonade.label: Lemonade
lemonade.tagline: Thirst-quench demand rises sharply when it runs hotter than normal.
lemonade.creative_angle: Refreshment cue: "Cool the {temp_f}°." Push grab-and-go, picnic and patio occasions.

iced_coffee.label: Iced Coffee
iced_coffee.tagline: Cold-brew interest tracks heat departures above the local normal.
iced_coffee.creative_angle: Swap the cue from warm to cold: "Iced, for the {temp_f}° afternoon." Morning + commute day-parts.

sports_drink.label: Sports Drink
sports_drink.tagline: Hydration demand lifts with above-normal heat and activity.
sports_drink.creative_angle: Performance + replenishment: "Out-sweat the {temp_f}°." Gym, field and outdoor-work occasions.

air_conditioning.label: Air Conditioning
air_conditioning.tagline: Cooling demand surges hardest of all when heat departs above normal.
air_conditioning.creative_angle: Urgency + relief: "{temp_f}° inside is optional." Push installation/units and same-week service windows.

soup.label: Soup
soup.tagline: Comfort demand rises when it turns colder than the local normal.
soup.creative_angle: Sell warmth: "When it turns, we're ready." Evening and weekend dwell-time, cozy at-home messaging.

hot_chocolate.label: Hot Chocolate
hot_chocolate.tagline: Hot-drink demand climbs as temperatures fall below normal.
hot_chocolate.creative_angle: Cosy occasion: "Colder than usual — warm up." Family, after-school and weekend-treat moments.

tea.label: Tea
tea.tagline: Tea interest lifts modestly when it runs cooler than normal.
tea.creative_angle: Everyday comfort: "A cooler-than-usual day calls for it." Morning and evening rituals.

slow_cooker.label: Slow Cooker
slow_cooker.tagline: Hearty-cooking demand rises on colder-than-normal stretches.
slow_cooker.creative_angle: Plan-ahead comfort: "Set it for the cold snap." Weekend grocery + meal-prep occasions.
